channel.title: ResumeAI Blog
channel.description: Career Advice & Resume Tips from the ResumeAI team.

item.title: The Ultimate Guide to Writing a Resume That Gets Noticed in 2024
item.description: Learn the essential strategies to craft a resume that stands out to recruiters and hiring managers in today's competitive job market.

item.title: 5 Common Resume Mistakes (and How to Avoid Them)
item.description: Don't let these simple mistakes cost you your dream job. Learn how to identify and fix the most common resume pitfalls.

item.title: How to Beat the Bots: Optimizing Your Resume for ATS
item.description: Learn the secrets to creating an Applicant Tracking System (ATS) friendly resume that ensures your application gets seen by a human.
